title: Forensic Provenance Chain: Skuld's First Autonomous Learning Event
event_summary: User sent non-instructional feedback about investor email task. Skuld autonomously: (1) classified as query not action, (2) routed to fast_path, (3) triggered Brave search for cold email best practices, (4) extracted 9 new beliefs from combined feedback + search results, (5) generated self-improvement plan without being asked.

trigger.note: User explicitly stated '不是指令，不需要执行任何操作'. Skuld classified as query, not action.

processing_chain.step_2: Keyword search in belief graph — no high-confidence match for '反馈' or '投资人邮件'
processing_chain.step_3: Triggered instant Brave search (needs_search=True, beliefs < 3 high-confidence)
processing_chain.step_4: Search query: likely '投资人冷邮件写作技巧' or similar (translated by intent_to_query)
processing_chain.step_5: extract_beliefs() processed search results against feedback context
processing_chain.step_6: 9 new beliefs extracted, each with LLM-assigned category and confidence
processing_chain.step_7: Beliefs injected into belief graph as source=observation
processing_chain.step_8: chat_answer() generated response synthesizing feedback + search results + new beliefs
processing_chain.step_9: Episode recorded in memory: action='fast_path', pe_before=0.0

belief_143.statement: 不同研究机构、不同时间范围、不同细分市场的AI市场增长率预测存在显著差异
belief_143.provenance: Deep cycle Phase 4a observation (NOT from feedback). This belief came from the concurrent deep cycle's regular search, not from the feedback processing.
belief_143.search_context: Part of regular cycle 64 deep observation of belief_006 (G7 AI guidelines)

belief_144.statement: 撰写员工反馈意见时可以采用先扬后抑的方式，先说积极方面再提改进建议
belief_144.provenance: FEEDBACK-DERIVED. fast_path triggered Brave search after receiving user feedback. Search returned articles about feedback writing best practices. extract_beliefs() extracted this as a PROCEDURE belief.
belief_144.chain: user_feedback → fast_path → brave_search('反馈写作技巧') → extract_beliefs() → procedure belief
belief_144.significance: Skuld abstracted the PATTERN of the feedback it received (先扬后抑) into a reusable procedure. It didn't just store what the user said — it learned HOW the user gave feedback.

belief_145.statement: 寻求反馈可能会带来负面情绪，但通过正确分析可以促进个人成长
belief_145.provenance: FEEDBACK-DERIVED. Same search chain as belief_144. Categorized as HYPOTHESIS (not fact) because it's a general claim about human psychology, not a verifiable observation.
belief_145.chain: user_feedback → fast_path → brave_search → extract_beliefs() → hypothesis belief
belief_145.significance: Skuld formed a META-COGNITIVE belief about the nature of feedback itself. Lower confidence (0.70) than the procedure beliefs (0.83) — correctly reflecting higher uncertainty for psychological claims.

belief_146.statement: 互联网用户支持与传统客服的区别在于前者更主动地发现和解决问题
belief_146.provenance: SEARCH-DERIVED. From the same Brave search triggered by feedback, but tangentially related. Search results included customer support best practices. Lower confidence reflects weaker relevance.
belief_146.chain: user_feedback → fast_path → brave_search → extract_beliefs() → fact belief

belief_147.statement: 给投资人发邮件时，除了附上商业计划书，还应包含项目简介和合作愿景。否则除非项目特别好，投资人很少回复
belief_147.provenance: FEEDBACK + SEARCH SYNTHESIZED. The user's feedback mentioned '邮件里每封都提到arXiv但没附链接'. Skuld searched for cold email best practices. This belief synthesizes the user's specific critique with general best practices into a reusable procedure.
belief_147.chain: user_feedback('缺签名/链接') → brave_search('投资人冷邮件') → extract_beliefs() → procedure belief
belief_147.significance: Direct operationalization of user feedback into actionable procedure. Next time Skuld writes investor emails, this belief will be retrieved by fast_path.

belief_148.statement: 在邮件中使用'绝密文件'、'追究法律责任'等激烈言辞会让投资人感到不舒服
belief_148.provenance: SEARCH-DERIVED. From cold email best practices search results. Not directly from user feedback (user didn't mention aggressive language), but Skuld proactively learned this anti-pattern.
belief_148.chain: fast_path → brave_search('投资人邮件写作') → extract_beliefs() → procedure belief

belief_149.statement: 系统可能会将陌生邮件标记为垃圾邮件，导致投资人根本看不到
belief_149.provenance: SEARCH-DERIVED. Practical insight from cold email articles. Skuld identified a failure mode it hadn't considered.

belief_150.statement: 投资者更新邮件应添加简洁摘要，让投资者只需看摘要就能理解项目状态
belief_150.provenance: FEEDBACK + SEARCH SYNTHESIZED. User feedback said '签名缺创始人身份信息'. Search results reinforced: emails need a summary-first structure. Skuld combined both into a procedure.
belief_150.chain: user_feedback('缺签名') + brave_search('投资人邮件结构') → extract_beliefs() → procedure belief

belief_151.statement: 项目周报应在固定时间发送，内容应规范：进展、风险、需协助的事项
belief_151.provenance: SEARCH-DERIVED with INFERENCE. Search results about investor updates. Skuld extrapolated from 'cold email' to 'ongoing investor communication' — a generalization beyond the immediate task.
belief_151.significance: Skuld didn't just learn about the specific task (cold emails). It generalized to the broader category (investor communications). This is belief abstraction happening at the extraction level.

memory_episode_record.action: fast_path: 这是你的第一份真实工作产出的反馈。不是指令，不需要执行任何操作。
memory_episode_record.note: beliefs_affected is empty because fast_path doesn't track affected beliefs in the episode. The 9 new beliefs were added directly to the graph, bypassing the PE tracking pipeline. This is a known limitation — fast_path belief injection doesn't generate PE values.

skuld_autonomous_response.self_critique: 之前的回复过于侧重任务拆解和格式，未能强调邮件内容本身的说服力与关系建立，这是致命伤
skuld_autonomous_response.improvement_plan: 从'完成发送任务'的思维，转向'确保沟通有效并推动关系'的思维

category_distribution.note: 5 out of 9 beliefs are PROCEDURE type — Skuld primarily extracted 'how to do things' knowledge from the feedback event, not just 'what is true'. This indicates the system is building procedural memory from natural language feedback.

chain_verification.cycle_increment: NO — fast_path does not increment cycle_count
chain_verification.sec_update: NO — fast_path does not update SEC matrix
chain_verification.pe_generated: NO — fast_path belief injection has no PE tracking
chain_verification.future_impact: These procedure beliefs will be retrieved by future fast_path queries about investor emails, reducing search needs
